scenarios.name: Set up MSW for Jest with React Testing Library to mock /api/users with a 500 error override per test
scenarios.rationale: Baseline uses older v1-style res/ctx handlers and partial lifecycle, while treatment uses the exact http.get + HttpResponse.json pattern with setupServer listen/resetHandlers/close and server.use override.

scenarios.name: Mock a GraphQL GetPosts query in the browser for local dev with realistic latency
scenarios.rationale: Baseline omits the msw init step and uses generic graphql mocks, while treatment uses graphql.query + HttpResponse.json with setupWorker, npx msw init ./public, and delay(300) as documented.
